source_label: Wiktionary — सर्व (Sanskrit sarva-, IPA /s̪ɐɾ.ʋɐ/, stress on the first syllable; sarvam = "all, everything")
notes: Sarvam AI is India's IndiaAI-Mission sovereign-model builder; its open Sarvam-M, Sarvam-30B and Sarvam-105B models ship on Hugging Face and are the default reference point for Indic-language LLM work. The name is Sanskrit सर्वम् "all, everything", where the inherent short a is a central /ə~ɐ/ — so it is SUR-vum, stressed on the first syllable, not "SAR-vam" with the vowel of "car".
